sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n57614" key="kitra=ton" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κιτρᾶτον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n57614.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">spiced drink prepared from citron</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0744.tlg001:8:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alex.Trall.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8.2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
